architecture_invariants: R3.5 remains the architecture endpoint; R3.7 consumes existing safety and contract architecture.
Universal Setup owns installed-state mutation and Universal Launcher owns product-neutral orchestration.
Frontends render generated contracts and contain no Factorio backend decisions.
AIDE makes no provider, model, Gateway, or product-network call.
Real Factorio execution and the H1 verdict remain operator-only and separate from this autonomous wave.
Archive and retention operations are reversible and never hard-delete managed content.
blockers: H1 has no reviewed real Factorio isolation verdict; this blocks only the human execution lane.
Signing, release, publication, credentials, networking, setup mutation, server execution, and RCON remain quarantined.

title: R3.7 instance lifecycle, local content intelligence, and operational UX

workunits.title: Preserve R3.6 authority and establish R3.7 truth
Add shared non-secret preferences and workspace resolution
Implement reversible instance inspection and lifecycle
Implement declarative templates and launch profiles
Implement deterministic bounded local dependency planning
Implement structural save intelligence and reversible retention
Implement reproducible headless server configuration planning
Generate guided frontend forms and operational visualizations
Prove the reversible lifecycle across transports and packages
Close R3.7 with exact cross-platform evidence
